CustomField.description: Coverage tier for this employee's group enrollment, selected manually on the Related Contacts list / Employee Roster: EO = Employee Only, ES = Employee + Spouse, ED = Employee + Dependent, EF = Employee + Family. Replaces the former auto-maintained Contact.Family__c checkbox so an admin can record who is enrolled. (가입 등급 - EO:본인만, ES:본인+배우자, ED:본인+자녀, EF:본인+가족. 관련 목록에서 수동 선택.)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the coverage tier: EO (Employee Only), ES (Employee + Spouse), ED (Employee + Dependent), EF (Employee + Family). (가입 등급 선택: EO 본인만 / ES 본인+배우자 / ED 본인+자녀 / EF 본인+가족.)
CustomField.label: Family
